fields.title: Emit sandbox diagnostic into tool output on failure
fields.description:
After runCommandCapture() returns with error, if usingSandbox && exitCode !== 0:

1. Call classifySandboxFailure(result.output)
2. Gate by config consistency:
   - network failure → only if networkMode !== 'allow-all'
   - filesystem failure → only if filesystemMode !== 'danger-full-access'
3. Emit diagnostic via onData():
   '[sandbox] Command failed likely due to sandbox restrictions (network/dns). (fs=workspace-write, net=deny). Evidence: "Could not resolve host". Network sandboxing on Linux can surface as DNS failures. If network is required, switch to allowlist/allow-all or re-run with escalate=true.'

This ensures model sees WHY command failed, not just cryptic error.

DoD: integration into bash handler + manual QA with network-denied curl
fields.close_reason: Emit sandbox diagnostic + gating and guidance into bash tool output on sandbox failure
